rf.title: Radio Frequency (RF)
rf.description: RF-related regulations, testing, certification, and export topics.

regulations.title: Regulations
regulations.description: Overview of RF-related regulatory bodies and rules.

subsections.name: Radio Frequency Regulations
subsections.summary: Radio Frequency Regulations for UAV systems

entries.source_title: Sorry for the Delay: How FAA Regulations in the U.S. are Stifling Innovation and Hindering the Growth of a Promising New Industry Based on Delivery Drones
entries.brief_summary: Argues that delivery-drone growth is hindered by restrictive Part 135 approvals and reliance on waivers / exemptions instead of a clear BVLOS rule.

entries.source_title: 5 Major Obstacles For Unmanned Aircraft Systems
entries.brief_summary: Identifies lack of spectrum access and the absence of a U.S. licensing scheme for BVLOS command-and-control links as a major regulatory bottleneck.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Overview of RF testing requirements and procedures.

subsections.name: Radio Frequency Testing
subsections.summary: Radio Frequency testing for UAV systems

entries.topic: Wi-Fi / U-NII / DFS channel-plan testing context
entries.brief_summary: ETC RF deck includes IEEE 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/ax references, U-NII channel-plan context under §15.407, and DFS-related testing context via FCC KDB 905462, which is directly relevant to drone Wi-Fi, telemetry, and video links using 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz radios.

entries.topic: Bluetooth FCC test items for 2.4 GHz modules
entries.brief_summary: ETC RF deck lists Bluetooth-related FCC test items including radiated emission, conducted emission, antenna requirement, 20 dB emission bandwidth, output power, out-of-band conducted spurious emissions, hopping-channel count and spacing, dwell time, and maximum permissible exposure under Part 15.247 / 15.207 / 15.203 / 2.1093.

entries.topic: FCC RF rule families and test methods used for wireless devices
entries.brief_summary: ETC RF deck maps U.S. FCC RF rule families and matching test methods, including Part 15 Subpart B with ANSI C63.4-2014, Part 15 Subpart C with ANSI C63.10-2013, Part 15 Subpart D with ANSI C63.17-2013, and Part 15 Subpart E / DFS with FCC KDB 905462.

entries.source_title: Updating References to Standards Related to the Commission's Equipment Authorization Program
entries.brief_summary: FCC incorporated ANSI C63.10-2020 for compliance testing of intentional radiators and set it as the required procedure for §15.31(a)(3) measurements after the transition period.

entries.topic: Drone RF module testing across FCC Parts 15 / 87 / 90 / 95
entries.source_title: Introduction to Drone FCC Certification in the USA | JJRLAB
entries.brief_summary: Commercial explainer that maps drone radio features to FCC Parts 15, 87, 90, and 95, and highlights RF range, transmit power, and EMC as common test items for export to the U.S.

entries.topic: Bluetooth / Wi-Fi / cellular modules as FCC-certified drone radios
entries.source_title: FCC/CE Testing and Certification for Drones - Compliance Testing
entries.brief_summary: Commercial explainer noting that drone RF transmitters, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular modules typically fall into FCC certification and RF testing workflows along with ESC/flight-controller EMC checks.

export-controls.title: Export Controls
export-controls.description: Overview of RF-related export and market-entry rules.

emc.title: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC)
emc.description: EMC-related regulations, testing, certification, and export topics.

regulations.title: Regulations
regulations.description: Overview of EMC-related rules and standards.

entries.brief_summary: FCC Part 15 devices may not cause harmful interference, must accept interference received, and may be required to cease operation until the interference condition is corrected.
FCC advises equipment designers to consider high-power licensed and government stations when choosing operating frequencies so equipment is less susceptible to harmful interference.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Overview of EMC testing requirements and procedures.

export-controls.title: Export Controls
export-controls.description: Overview of EMC-related export and market-entry rules.

regulations.title: Regulations
regulations.description: Overview of reliability and airworthiness regulations.

subsections.name: Reliability and Airworthiness Regulations
subsections.summary: Reliability and Airworthiness Regulations for UAV systems in the United States

entries.source_title: Client Alert: FAA: Drone Manufacturers Must Self-Regulate
entries.brief_summary: Explains how the 2018 FAA Reauthorization Act extended FAA authority to drone manufacturers and pushed manufacturer-side compliance / self-certification responsibilities.
FAA overview page explaining type, production, and airworthiness certification for UAS under Part 21; foundational U.S. certification reference.

entries.source_title: Understanding the FAA’s New Drone Type Certification Process | UST
entries.brief_summary: Explains the FAA’s five-phase type certification process and how tailored airworthiness criteria are built around the intended UAS operation.

entries.source_title: How Does the FAA Aircraft Certification Process Affect UAVs? | Commercial UAV News
entries.brief_summary: Describes FAA review of some UAS designs through aircraft-style certification and emphasizes the cost burden on smaller manufacturers.
Discusses how unmanned platforms face the challenge of meeting manned-aircraft-style safety certification expectations, including DO-178C / DO-254 style burdens.

entries.source_title: UAS Sense and Avoid System Certification Obstacles
entries.brief_summary: FAA research outline on the certification barriers facing sense-and-avoid systems needed for compliance with 14 CFR Part 91 flight rules.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Overview of reliability and airworthiness testing procedures.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Overview of reliability and airworthiness certification pathways.

export-controls.title: Export Controls
export-controls.description: Overview of reliability-related market-entry and export issues.
